title: Specify volume for kobayashi_nomizu_differential_geometry
resolution: 已拆兩卷（booklists/math.json：原 slug→Volume I + 新增 _vol2→Volume II）
evidence: slug kobayashi_nomizu_differential_geometry maps to 'Foundations of Differential Geometry', but inspect 1267482 says it is a two-volume work; search also returns explicit Volume I (840569) and Volume II (a70b60). Current target/slug lacks volume disambiguation.
proposal: Amend SoT to specify Volume I, Volume II, or an explicit two-volume target; if both are needed, split into separate slugs.
risk: Without disambiguation, crawl agents may commit only one volume and silently underfetch the intended reference.
